proof: function[T0, T1, T4](x0: T0, x1: Sum[T0, T1], x2: T0 -> T4, x3: T1 -> T4) { Sum.inl[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_cases[T0, T1, T4](x1, x2, x3) = x2(x0) }[T, U, V](x, Sum.inl[T, U](x), left, right)
function[T0, T1, T4](x0: T1, x1: Sum[T0, T1], x2: T0 -> T4, x3: T1 -> T4) { Sum.inr[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_cases[T0, T1, T4](x1, x2, x3) = x3(x0) }[T, U, V](y, Sum.inr[T, U](y), left, right)

function[T0, T1, T4, T5](x0: T0, x1: Sum[T0, T1], x2: T0 -> T4, x3: T1 -> T5) { Sum.inl[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_map[T0, T1, T4, T5](x1, x2, x3) = Sum.inl[T4, T5](x2(x0)) }[T, U, V, W](x, Sum.inl[T, U](x), left, right)

function[T0, T1, T4, T5](x0: T1, x1: Sum[T0, T1], x2: T0 -> T4, x3: T1 -> T5) { Sum.inr[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_map[T0, T1, T4, T5](x1, x2, x3) = Sum.inr[T4, T5](x3(x0)) }[T, U, V, W](y, Sum.inr[T, U](y), left, right)
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: T0, x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T1 -> T3) { sum_map[T0, T1, T2, T3](Sum.inl[T0, T1](x0), x1, x2) = Sum.inl[T2, T3](x1(x0)) }[T, U, V, U](x, left, identity_fn[U])
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T2) { sum_map[T0, T1, T2, T1](x0, x1, identity_fn[T1]) = sum_map_left[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1) }[T, U, V](Sum.inl[T, U](x), left)
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: T1, x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T1 -> T3) { sum_map[T0, T1, T2, T3](Sum.inr[T0, T1](x0), x1, x2) = Sum.inr[T2, T3](x2(x0)) }[T, U, V, U](y, left, identity_fn[U])
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T2) { sum_map[T0, T1, T2, T1](x0, x1, identity_fn[T1]) = sum_map_left[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1) }[T, U, V](Sum.inr[T, U](y), left)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[U](y)
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: T0, x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T1 -> T3) { sum_map[T0, T1, T2, T3](Sum.inl[T0, T1](x0), x1, x2) = Sum.inl[T2, T3](x1(x0)) }[T, U, T, W](x, identity_fn[T], right)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[T](x)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T0, T1]) { sum_map[T0, T1, T0, T2](x0, identity_fn[T0]) = sum_map_right[T0, T1, T2](x0) }[T, U, W](Sum.inl[T, U](x))
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: T1, x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T1 -> T3) { sum_map[T0, T1, T2, T3](Sum.inr[T0, T1](x0), x1, x2) = Sum.inr[T2, T3](x2(x0)) }[T, U, T, W](y, identity_fn[T], right)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T0, T1], x1: T1 -> T2) { sum_map[T0, T1, T0, T2](x0, identity_fn[T0], x1) = sum_map_right[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1) }[T, U, W](Sum.inr[T, U](y), right)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0, x1: Sum[T0, T1]) { Sum.inl[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_swap[T0, T1](x1) = Sum.inr[T1, T0](x0) }[T, U](x, Sum.inl[T, U](x))
function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: Sum[T0, T1]) { Sum.inr[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_swap[T0, T1](x1) = Sum.inl[T1, T0](x0) }[T, U](y, Sum.inr[T, U](y))

goal: sum_assoc[T, U, V](s) = Sum.inl[T, Sum[U, V]](t)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T0, T1], x1: Sum[Sum[T0, T1], T2], x2: T0) { x0.inl != x1 or Sum.inl[T0, T1](x2) != x0 or Sum.inl[T0, Sum[T1, T2]](x2) = sum_assoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[T, U, V](tu, s, t)
function(x0: Sum[T, U]) { x0.inl != s or Sum.inl[T, U](t) != x0 }(tu)

goal: sum_unassoc[T, U, V](sum_assoc[T, U, V](s)) = Sum.inl[T, U](t).inl
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T0, x1: Sum[T0, Sum[T1, T2]]) { Sum.inl[T0, Sum[T1, T2]](x0) != x1 or Sum.inl[T0, T1](x0).inl = sum_unassoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[T, U, V](t, sum_assoc[T, U, V](s))

goal: sum_unassoc[T, U, V](sum_assoc[T, U, V](s)) = s
proof: Sum.inl[T, U](t).inl = s
Sum.inl[T, U](t).inl != s
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T0, T1], x1: Sum[Sum[T0, T1], T2], x2: T1) { x0.inl != x1 or Sum.inr[T0, T1](x2) != x0 or Sum.inl[T1, T2](x2).inr = sum_assoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[T, U, V](tu, s, u)
function(x0: Sum[T, U]) { x0.inl != s or Sum.inr[T, U](u) != x0 }(tu)

goal: sum_unassoc[T, U, V](sum_assoc[T, U, V](s)) = Sum.inr[T, U](u).inl
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T1, T2], x1: Sum[T0, Sum[T1, T2]], x2: T1) { x0.inr != x1 or Sum.inl[T1, T2](x2) != x0 or Sum.inr[T0, T1](x2).inl = sum_unassoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[T, U, V](Sum.inl[U, V](u), sum_assoc[T, U, V](s), u)
function(x0: Sum[U, V]) { x0.inr != sum_assoc[T, U, V](s) or Sum.inl[U, V](u) != x0 }(Sum.inl[U, V](u))

goal: sum_unassoc[T, U, V](sum_assoc[T, U, V](s)) = s
proof: Sum.inr[T, U](u).inl = s
Sum.inr[T, U](u).inl != s
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T2, x1: Sum[Sum[T0, T1], T2]) { Sum.inr[Sum[T0, T1], T2](x0) != x1 or Sum.inr[T1, T2](x0).inr = sum_assoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[T, U, V](v, s)

goal: sum_unassoc[T, U, V](sum_assoc[T, U, V](s)) = Sum.inr[Sum[T, U], V](v)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T1, T2], x1: Sum[T0, Sum[T1, T2]], x2: T2) { x0.inr != x1 or Sum.inr[T1, T2](x2) != x0 or Sum.inr[Sum[T0, T1], T2](x2) = sum_unassoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[T, U, V](Sum.inr[U, V](v), sum_assoc[T, U, V](s), v)
function(x0: Sum[U, V]) { x0.inr != sum_assoc[T, U, V](s) or Sum.inr[U, V](v) != x0 }(Sum.inr[U, V](v))

goal: sum_unassoc[T, U, V](sum_assoc[T, U, V](s)) = s
proof: sum_unassoc[T, U, V](sum_assoc[T, U, V](s)) != Sum.inr[Sum[T, U], V](v)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T0, x1: Sum[T0, Sum[T1, T2]]) { Sum.inl[T0, Sum[T1, T2]](x0) != x1 or Sum.inl[T0, T1](x0).inl = sum_unassoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[T, U, V](t, s)

goal: sum_assoc[T, U, V](sum_unassoc[T, U, V](s)) = Sum.inl[T, Sum[U, V]](t)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T0, T1], x1: Sum[Sum[T0, T1], T2], x2: T0) { x0.inl != x1 or Sum.inl[T0, T1](x2) != x0 or Sum.inl[T0, Sum[T1, T2]](x2) = sum_assoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[T, U, V](Sum.inl[T, U](t), sum_unassoc[T, U, V](s), t)
function(x0: Sum[T, U]) { x0.inl != sum_unassoc[T, U, V](s) or Sum.inl[T, U](t) != x0 }(Sum.inl[T, U](t))

goal: sum_assoc[T, U, V](sum_unassoc[T, U, V](s)) = s
proof: sum_assoc[T, U, V](sum_unassoc[T, U, V](s)) != Sum.inl[T, Sum[U, V]](t)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T1, T2], x1: Sum[T0, Sum[T1, T2]], x2: T1) { x0.inr != x1 or Sum.inl[T1, T2](x2) != x0 or Sum.inr[T0, T1](x2).inl = sum_unassoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[T, U, V](uv, s, u)
function(x0: Sum[U, V]) { x0.inr != s or Sum.inl[U, V](u) != x0 }(uv)

goal: sum_assoc[T, U, V](sum_unassoc[T, U, V](s)) = Sum.inl[U, V](u).inr
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T0, T1], x1: Sum[Sum[T0, T1], T2], x2: T1) { x0.inl != x1 or Sum.inr[T0, T1](x2) != x0 or Sum.inl[T1, T2](x2).inr = sum_assoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[T, U, V](Sum.inr[T, U](u), sum_unassoc[T, U, V](s), u)
function(x0: Sum[T, U]) { x0.inl != sum_unassoc[T, U, V](s) or Sum.inr[T, U](u) != x0 }(Sum.inr[T, U](u))

goal: sum_assoc[T, U, V](sum_unassoc[T, U, V](s)) = s
proof: Sum.inl[U, V](u).inr = s
Sum.inl[U, V](u).inr != s

goal: sum_unassoc[T, U, V](s) = Sum.inr[Sum[T, U], V](v)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T1, T2], x1: Sum[T0, Sum[T1, T2]], x2: T2) { x0.inr != x1 or Sum.inr[T1, T2](x2) != x0 or Sum.inr[Sum[T0, T1], T2](x2) = sum_unassoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[T, U, V](uv, s, v)
function(x0: Sum[U, V]) { x0.inr != s or Sum.inr[U, V](v) != x0 }(uv)

goal: sum_assoc[T, U, V](sum_unassoc[T, U, V](s)) = Sum.inr[U, V](v).inr
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T2, x1: Sum[Sum[T0, T1], T2]) { Sum.inr[Sum[T0, T1], T2](x0) != x1 or Sum.inr[T1, T2](x0).inr = sum_assoc[T0, T1, T2](x1) }[T, U, V](v, sum_unassoc[T, U, V](s))

goal: sum_assoc[T, U, V](sum_unassoc[T, U, V](s)) = s
proof: Sum.inr[U, V](v).inr = s
Sum.inr[U, V](v).inr != s
